creator: Rainer.Hurling@rhurlin.de
text:
After a long time without QGIS on HEAD, I created an update to 2.2.0
with some improvements. This update works fine on HEAD an 10.0:

- change MASTER_SITES to github
- add license
- change tarball from .bzip2 to .tgz
- use new LIB_DEPENDS format
- update build dependencies
- use clang with new compiler features, if possible
- remove BROKEN for 7.x
- only default option is postgis now
- support staging


The update works on HEAD and 10.0, but fails for 8.4 and 9.2 (all tested
on RedPorts). On systems <10.0 CMAKE complains about missing
EXECINFO_LIBRARY.

I tried to add libexecinfo detection in an ugly cmake hack, because it
seems to be needed for systems <10.0. Both patch files are found under
files/ .

Unfortunately I was not able to get it working. It would be really nice,
if someone with more cmake knowledge could investigate at this.

I am looking forward to an updated QGIS version in the ports.

Regards,
Rainer Hurling
